verse.name: V1
verse.lines: /: There is none like You No one else can touch my heart like You do I could search for all eternity long And find, there is none like You :/

verse.name: V2
verse.lines: Your mercy flows like a river wide and healing comes from Your hand Suffering children are safe in Your arms, There is none like You

verse.name: V3
verse.lines: /: There is none like You No one else can touch my heart like You do I could search for all eternity long And find there is none like You :/

verse.name: V4
verse.lines: Oh I could search for all eternity long And find there is none There is none There is none like You
